case_title: JIMENEZ, COLMAN MARTINEZ vs. TERHEYDEN, LUCAS RICHARD AN IND.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIMENEZ, COLMAN MARTINEZ AS TO DEFENDANT TERHEYDEN, LUCAS RICHARD AN IND.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JIMENEZ, COLMAN MARTINEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TERHEYDEN, LUCAS RICHARD AN IND. $4,848.07 PRINCIPAL, $93.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,941.07
